pi_items.source: Analyzed Redmine 6.0 source code (lib/redmine/my_page.rb). The internal block ID for the 'Spent time' widget (label_spent_time) is 'timelog', not 'spent_time'.

privileged_info_summary: The task metadata and verifier incorrectly expect the internal block ID for 'Spent time' to be 'spent_time', but in Redmine 6.0 the actual block ID is 'timelog'. Therefore, an agent correctly following the user prompt will produce an expected layout using 'timelog' in the right zone, which the verifier will incorrectly fail.
